title: Whispering Hollow
description:
Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]

options.title: Hug the Tree
options.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].

conditions: All players have at least 50 Gold
notes: The [gold]Exchange Gold[/gold] option presents [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold] as rewards to pick from. The [gold]Hug the Tree[/gold] option lets you select one card from your deck to [gold]Transform[/gold] into a random different card; the [red]9[/red] HP loss is [red]unblockable[/red] and unaffected by powers.
